Lock Picking, Lockouts & Door Lock Repair

This page covers residential lockouts, compatible lock picking, sticky cylinders and door lock repair across Wellington. If you are locked out, dealing with a failed cylinder or need a lock opened and repaired properly, this is the right page.

Common issues

Locked out of the house, key no longer turning, sticky cylinder, worn lock hardware or a door that only opens with force.

What we do

We try non-destructive entry first, then service or replace the cylinder and related hardware if the lock is worn, damaged or beyond clean opening.

What happens next

Urgent lockout? Call. Non-urgent job? Send the form and we will reply with availability and what proof of authority is needed.

Searches we commonly help with

This page is aimed at local searches like lock picking Wellington, door lock repair Wellington, locked out of house Wellington, cylinder replacement, front door lock repair, lockout entry Porirua, lockout Lower Hutt and lock picking Kapiti. It is not a general locksmith supply page; it is a local service page for people who need the door opened and the lock sorted.

Handles, locks and hardware Aluminium joinery repairs

Need lockout entry or lock repair?

Call for urgent lockouts. Use the form for non-urgent cylinder replacement, sticky locks and general door lock repair.

Wellington, Porirua, Hutt Valley, Petone and Kapiti.

Where we work

We attend lockouts and door lock repairs across Central Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti.

Related pages: Hardware and lock replacement • Aluminium joinery repairs

Helpful guides

  • Digital locks in Wellington: Elock, Yale YDM and Doric DE10

Lock picking FAQs

Do you offer lock picking across Wellington?

Yes. We provide lock picking and lockout entry across Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti for compatible residential locks.

Can you replace the cylinder if the lock cannot be picked cleanly?

Yes. If non-destructive entry is not suitable, we can replace the cylinder or related lock hardware where appropriate.

Do you need proof before opening a door?

Yes. We only provide entry when occupancy or authority for the property can be verified.
